rn.t:
(英国)皇家海军, 注册护士
[计] 新闻阅读程序
rn.d:
n a radioactive gaseous element formed by the disintegration of radium; the heaviest of the inert gasses; occurs naturally (especially in areas over granite) and is considered a hazard to health
n a graduate nurse who has passed examinations for registration

rna.d: n (biochemistry) a long linear polymer of nucleotides found in the nucleus but mainly in the cytoplasm of a cell where it is associated with microsomes; it transmits genetic information from DNA to the cytoplasm and controls certain chemical processes in the cell

rnai.t: abbr. RNA interference 核糖核酸干扰

rnas.t:
皇家海军航空站（Royal Naval Air Station）
皇家海军航空服务（Royal Naval Air Service）
rnas.d: n. (biochemistry) a long linear polymer of nucleotides found in the nucleus but mainly in the cytoplasm of a cell where it is associated with microsomes; it transmits genetic information from DNA to the cytoplasm and controls certain chemical processes in the cell

rnase.d: n a transferase that catalyzes the hydrolysis of ribonucleic acid

rnb.t: abbr. 节奏布鲁斯（Rhythm and Blues）

rnc.t: abbr. Royal Naval College <英>皇家海军学院

rncc.t: abbr. regional network control center 区域网络控制中心

rnd.t: abbr. 皇家海军局（Royal Naval Division）

rndius.t: [医] 桡骨, 半径, 辐射线(解剖)

rne.t: [医][=radionuclide esophagogram]放射性核素食管造影照片

rng.t: abbr. 无线电网络网关（Radio Network Gateway）；随机数发生器（random number generator）

rni.t: abbr. recommended nutrient intake 推荐营养素摄取

rnl.t: [医][=radionuclide lymphoscintigraphy]放射性核素淋巴闪烁照相术

rnle.t: abbr. resource name list entry 资源名表项目

rnr.t: abbr. runner 参加赛跑者，（雪橇，溜冰鞋的）滑走部分

rnt.t: abbr. residual nitrogern time 氮停留时间; roentgenologist 德国物理学家; roentgenology X光线学; X光科
